name: Help America Vote Act of 2002
description: US federal election-administration law (Pub. L. 107-252) enacted in response to the 2000 election. Establishes the Election Assistance Commission (EAC), provides funding for state election system upgrades, and sets voting-system and voter-registration standards. Election cybersecurity baseline.
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to election systems and voter registration databases that may be cloud-hosted.
relationToAISecurity: AI systems used in voter-registration processing or election administration are within scope.

license.notes: Work of the US government is in the public domain in the United States per 17 USC § 105.

lifecycle.notes: Enacted 2002-10-29; codified primarily at 52 USC § 20901 et seq.

current_extraction.notes: Source PDF from govinfo.gov PLAW-107publ252, marker-extracted to markdown. Parsed via shared extract_us_plaw.py PLAW parser into per-section structured CSV/JSON across multiple Titles.
